installCommand: npm i --no-save --silent && npm run build || true

requiredEnv.name: CURSOR_HOOK_NTFY_TOPIC
requiredEnv.description: ntfy topic name to receive notifications (e.g. cursor-agent)

requiredEnv.name: CURSOR_HOOK_NTFY_SERVER
requiredEnv.description: Optional: custom ntfy server URL (default: https://ntfy.sh)
